action.reasoning: Observation: 3 epochs with frozen ESM2 gave val_rho=0.4757. Each epoch ~630s. Analysis: Only regression head was trained (180K params). Fine-tuning ESM2 should improve significantly. Decision: Submit current checkpoint for baseline, then train with full fine-tuning using differential LR (lower for ESM2, higher for head). Also focus pooling on mutation region (positions 561-588).
